comment: A name that will always be remembered in the UCF comp sci department, and not in a good way. His office smelled so bad and he was really weird towards his female TA. I can confirm that the rumors were true and that we were all uncomfortable. Meade marked a stain on UCF's name and I hope it doesn't happen again.
Is That The Hello Kitty Man?

Took this class during undergrad for CS1. He often started lectures 15 minutes early. During a semester when a hurricane devastated the area and some students had flooded apartments or no power, he refused to extend homework deadlines and told us to figure it out ourselves.
